hero.title: Explore VisiSekolah Academy
hero.subtitle: Creating a superior generation with integration of technology and noble values. Admissions for the 2026/2027 Academic Year are now open.

home_features.title: What VisiSekolah Academy Offers?
home_features.subtitle: We offer an active and positively competitive learning atmosphere

white_label.title: Top Accreditation
white_label.desc: Accredited 'A' with national education standards that exceed expectations.

lms.title: Adaptive Curriculum
lms.desc: Learning that focuses on developing self-potential and student character.

payments.title: Advanced Labs
payments.desc: Complete practice facilities ranging from science and languages to art studios.

parent_portal.title: Digital Ecosystem

about_page.title: Shaping the Future Through Education.
about_page.subtitle: VisiSekolah High School is committed to providing high-quality education that combines intellectual, emotional, and spiritual intelligence.

vision.title: Vision & Mission
vision.desc: "To be a model educational institution that produces graduates with noble character, intelligence, creativity, and independence who can compete globally."

empathy.title: Integrity
empathy.desc: Upholding honesty and ethics in every aspect of school life.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Encouraging creativity and the use of technology in the learning process.

inspiration.title: Excellence
inspiration.desc: Committed to achieving the highest standards in education and character.

contact_page.title: We Are Ready to Serve You.
contact_page.subtitle: Have questions about enrollment or other school information? Our team is ready to help you.

sidebar.location: Main Building 1st Floor, 123 Education St., BSD, Tangerance

footer.slogan: Shaping future leaders through technology and character-based education.
footer.copyright: VisiSekolah High School. All Rights Reserved.

features_page.title: The Best Learning Ecosystem for the Future.
features_page.subtitle: We provide international standard curricula supported by modern facilities to optimize student potential.

white_label.title: Bilingual Program
white_label.desc: Application of English in science and mathematics subjects for global competitiveness.

security.title: Safe School
security.desc: Integrated security system and a child-friendly school environment.

lms.title: Merdeka Curriculum
lms.desc: Implementation of the latest curriculum providing learning flexibility for students.

payments.title: Creative Studio
payments.desc: Music, podcast, and visual arts studio facilities to channel student talent.

mobile.title: Extracurriculars
mobile.desc: More than 20 extracurricular options ranging from robotics to competitive sports.

parent_portal.title: Healthy Canteen
parent_portal.desc: Canteen with nutritional monitoring and hygienic non-cash payment systems.

analytics.title: College Prep
analytics.desc: Guidance program for entering top national and international universities from grade 10.

login_page.title: VisiSekolah HS Portal
login_page.subtitle: Log in to your account to access school digital services.

faq.q: How do I apply to VisiSekolah High School?
faq.a: Registration can be completed online via the 'Daftar PPDB' button on the home page or by visiting the PPDB Secretariat in person.

faq.q: What are the requirements for new student registration?
faq.a: Main requirements include Junior High School diploma, Family Card, Birth Certificate, and recent passport photo.
